channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: India rejects offensive remarks in Trump repost, emphasises strong US-India ties
item.description: The Ministry of External Affairs (MEA) of India on Thursday issued a statement responding to US President Donald Trump's repost of comments from a right-wing commentator, Michael Savage, who described...

item.title: African Currencies Losing Value Against US Dollar in Early 2026
item.description: As of April 2026, the Libyan dinar has emerged as Africa's worst-performing currency, losing over 17% against the US dollar. Following it are the Ghanaian cedi with a 10.28% decline and the Tanzanian ...

item.title: Kenya Meteorological Department Warns of Heavy Rainfall and Strong Winds Across Several Counties
item.description: The Kenya Meteorological Department (KMD) has issued a warning for continued rainfall across various regions of Kenya over the next 24 hours, highlighting heavier downpours along the coastal counties ...

item.title: Exploring the Mathematical Precision in Paolo Čerić’s Animated GIFs
item.description: Paolo Čerić, a Croatian programmer and visual artist, has been creating animated GIFs that challenge the viewer's perception and offer a unique visual experience. His work is characterized by mathemat...

item.title: Frustrating Experience of Trying to Buy World Cup Tickets for Vancouver
item.description: Marsha Lederman shares the tale of her chaotic attempt to purchase World Cup tickets for Vancouver. Despite multiple attempts in various lotteries, she was unable to secure tickets for her soccer-obse...

item.title: Alexandria Enriquez wins first gold medal for Philippines at Sanya Asian Beach Games
item.description: Naghatid ng karangalan si Alexandria Enriquez matapos masungkit ang kauna-unahang gintong medalya ng Team Philippines sa ginaganap na Asian Beach Games sa Sanya, China. Ang kanyang panalo ay nagsilbin...

item.title: Skepta found not guilty of drug-driving after court questions evidence reliability
item.description: British grime artist Skepta, whose real name is Joseph Adenuga, has been cleared of a drug-driving charge following court proceedings at High Wycombe Magistrates' Court. The case stemmed from an incid...

item.title: Balik-tanaw sa Kapamilya Deal or No Deal contestants na umuwi na may ₱1 na premyo
item.description: The article looks back at memorable moments from the Philippine game show “Kapamilya Deal or No Deal,” focusing on contestants who ended up winning only ₱1, commonly referred to as becoming “pisonaryo...

item.title: Gaza faces massive reconstruction needs and severe humanitarian crisis after conflict
item.description: A new report from the United Nations and European Union, in coordination with the World Bank, highlights the devastating impact of more than two years of conflict in Gaza from October 2023 to October ...

item.title: A Cyclic Universe Model Suggests Dark Matter Could Consist of Primordial Black Holes
item.description: A recent cosmological proposal explores an unconventional explanation for dark matter by combining two speculative ideas in physics: cyclic universes and primordial black holes. Dark matter, which mak...

item.title: Escalating maritime tensions challenge fragile Iran–U.S. ceasefire in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Tensions between Iran and the United States are intensifying again despite an existing ceasefire, as new incidents unfold in the strategically critical Strait of Hormuz. According to reports, Iranian ...

item.title: Alberta Premier to provide update on fall referendum question
item.description: Alberta Premier Danielle Smith is preparing to give an update regarding the government's plan for the fall referendum question. While specific details have not yet been publicly disclosed, the announc...

item.title: Cape Town intensifies conservation efforts for critically endangered African penguins
item.description: The City of Cape Town is commemorating World Penguin Day on Saturday, April 25, with an urgent call to action regarding the African penguin, now classified as Critically Endangered. Following a 2024 u...

item.title: 695 Police Officers Transferred from Lagos Zone 2 Amid Allegations of Poor Welfare and Unpaid Allowances
item.description: In a major shake-up within the Nigeria Police Force, 695 officers have been transferred from Zone 2 Command in Lagos to various locations across the country. The move, led by former Lagos CP AIG Jimoh...

item.title: Trump Announces Invitation for Netanyahu and Aoun to Washington for Talks
item.description: In a development amid ongoing Middle East tensions, U.S. President Donald Trump announced that he will invite Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and Lebanese President Joseph Aoun to Washington...

item.title: Researchers Discover Fast16 Malware That Could Have Sabotaged Iran’s Nuclear Efforts Before Stuxnet
item.description: Newly discovered malware known as Fast16, which dates back to 2005, may have been used in an early cyberattack against Iran's nuclear program, possibly predating the infamous Stuxnet attack. Researche...

item.title: Former business partner faces court over alleged harassment via emails
item.description: Simon Lyons, a 45-year-old investment executive, appeared at Southwark Crown Court accused of harassing his former business partner, Farid Alizadeh, and Alizadeh's wife, Natasha. The pair co-founded E...

item.title: Congress Challenges EC Notice to Kharge Over His Remarks on PM Modi
item.description: On 23 April 2026, the Congress party submitted a summary response to the Election Commission's notice issued to its president, Mallikarjun Kharge, regarding his controversial 'terrorist' remark. The p...

item.title: Ferré Gola to Make Johannesburg Debut with Live Acoustic Show in May
item.description: South African music fans can look forward to a major live performance as celebrated Congolese artist Ferré Gola prepares for his first-ever concert in Johannesburg. The event is scheduled for Saturday...

item.title: 10-year-old Texas boy charged with murder following fatal stabbing of 13-year-old girl
item.description: A tragic incident in Houston, Texas, has resulted in the death of 13-year-old Riley DeArmas after a confrontation involving multiple young people. A 10-year-old boy, who was present during the inciden...
